topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that control smart plugs and devices based on temperature and weather conditions, optimizing energy use by turning devices on or off in response to environmental changes.

rows.if_then_rule: IF air quality changes from WeMo Air Purifier THEN set air purifier mode using WeMo Air Purifier.
IF air pressure drops below from Netatmo Weather Station THEN turn off using WeMo Smart Plug.
IF wind speed rises above from Weather THEN turn off using WeMo Switch.
IF temperature drops below from Netatmo Weather Station THEN turn A/C off using Sensibo.
